ordering: insertion order == increasing uid; list(pending.values()) is increasing-uid (lazy.py:70-73)

x.mutated_by: _conj_h/_conj_s/_conj_cx on every Clifford (lazy.py:111-134); S2 in-place (bounded.py h/s/cx)

phase.meaning: accumulated i^phase from lazy h/s/cz conjugation (e.g. Y=i^1 XZ)

no_separate_applied_flag: there is NO field tracking whether a rotation was applied to dense state; presence in `pending` == not-yet-flushed; removal (del pending[uid]) == consumed (lazy.py:226)
dead_alive: dead = never-flushed uids dropped at apply_rotation (lazy.py:140-141, _dead_uids); alive = in pending; consumed = del from pending during _do_flush
